name: Kuroeda - Too much Elf Ass
description:
I been reading Plus Sized Elf, this is easily my favorite character. This one is for me. A dark elf with too much ass, not to hard to figure out. Have fun, I know it says limited, but the bots are still down for NSFW. Just makes it a bit of a slow burn which I like
Also the art is from synecdoche
creator: mmolemman
